The '''224th Recon Patrol Squad''' was a reconnaissance unit of the [[Corellian Security Force]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:RRBFA" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> one of the unit's soldiers went missing after a wilderness survival exercise on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. A [[transponder]] check showed that he was still stuck out in the Corellian wilderness, with a broken leg and many hungry animals gathering. Because the unit was due to be shipped offworld soon, their [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Imperial Liaison|liaison]] remained uncaring who would be left behind. But as the 224th had always worked from the principle of leaving no one behind, they went outside the usual channels to rescue their comrade, hiring experienced hunters to dispose of the animals while one member of the 224th did the rescue work.<ref name="SWG:RRBFA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The 224th Recon Patrol Squad was mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RRBFA" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The 224th Recon Patrol Squad was mentioned in the description of a mission called "Rescue Recon Buddy From Animals" available to players at [[mission terminal]]s on Corellia.<ref name="SWG:RRBFA" />
